name: Allura
description: Allura — Apache OSS project hosting platform combining Git/Mercurial repositories, ticketing, wiki, and mailing lists.

seo.title: Allura — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Allura: Allura — Apache OSS project hosting platform combining Git/Mercurial repositories, ticketing, wiki, and mailing lists.

when_to_use: Self-hosted OSS project hosting with Git and tickets
Migrate projects from SVN to Git with history intact
Collaborative wiki and mailing list for open-source teams
Webhook-triggered CI on push to hosted repositories

pros: Handles Git, Mercurial, SVN in one place
Integrated tickets, wiki, forums, mailing lists
cons: Python 2 legacy baggage, painful to deploy
UI feels a decade behind GitHub/GitLab
Sparse community activity and slow releases
review.verdict: A dated but functional OSS forge if you truly need multi-VCS hosting and the Apache brand.
review.best_for: OSS foundations wanting a self-hosted forge with Mercurial and SVN alongside Git.
review.not_for: Teams that want a polished, modern DevOps experience.

developer_experience.reason: Legacy platform, slower development, thin docs
